ddls:
CREATE TABLE "literary_works" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literary work */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the literary work */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the work */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the work */,
  "abs_count" INTEGER /* Absolute word count of the work */,
  "lexical_diversity" REAL /* Lexical diversity score of the work */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the work was published */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the work */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literary_works_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literary_works_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the author was born */,
  "death_year" INTEGER /* Year the author died (if applicable) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., literature, classic, adventure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "subgenre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a subgenre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_subgenre_id FOREIGN KEY ("subgenre_id") REFERENCES subgenres ("subgenre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subgenres" (
  "subgenre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subgenre */,
  "subgenre_name" TEXT /* Name of the subgenre (e.g., romance, science fiction) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subgenre */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subgenre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_distributions" (
  "freq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for frequency distribution entry */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary work */,
  "word_list" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of words and their frequencies */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Total word count for the work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequency_distributions_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lexical_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lexical analysis entry */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary work */,
  "unique_words" INTEGER /* Count of unique words used in the work */,
  "avg_word_length" REAL /* Average length of words in the work */,
  "lexical_diversity_score" REAL /* Lexical diversity score of the work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lexical_analysis_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, scholar, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the work */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature entry */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary work */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the textual feature (e.g., tone, style) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the textual feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_features_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborative_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborative project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the lead researcher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborative_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaborative project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., researcher, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES collaborative_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the work */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work uploaded */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date of the upload */,
  "upload_type" TEXT /* Type of upload (e.g., new work, updated work) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation entry */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary work */,
  "citation_style" TEXT /* Citation style (e.g., MLA, APA, Chicago) */,
  "citation_text" TEXT /* Citation text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation entry */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary work */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)
